def test_10_cart_page_load(self):
        """CT-01: 购物车页面加载"""
        detail = GoodsDetailPage(self.mini)
        detail.go_back()
        time.sleep(1)

        self.mini.app.switch_tab('/pages/cart/cart')
        time.sleep(1.5)
        cart = CartPage(self.mini)
        cart.wait_loaded()
        self._screenshot('10_cart_page')

        # 购物车可以为空，只要页面正常加载即可
        print(f'  购物车商品数: {cart.get_cart_goods_count()}')
